reported_papers.title: StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception

reported_papers.title: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta Prediction for Efficient Dual-System Vision-Language-Action Model Inference
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.02739v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dual-system Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve state-of-the-art robotic manipulation but are bottlenecked by the VLM backbone, which must execute at every control step while producing temporally redundant features. reported_papers.title: Learning Equivariant Neural-Augmented Object Dynamics From Few Interactions
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.02699v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Learning data-efficient object dynamics models for robotic manipulation remains challenging, especially for deformable objects. reported_papers.title: AnchorD: Metric Grounding of Monocular Depth Using Factor Graphs
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.02667v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dense and accurate depth estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, grasping, and navigation, yet currently available depth sensors are prone to errors on transparent, specular, and general non-Lambertian surfaces. reported_papers.reason: 专注于单目深度估计的度量级校准，属于纯计算机视觉感知任务，未涉及机器人操作决策或VLA架构，故过滤。

reported_papers.title: CoRAL: Contact-Rich Adaptive LLM-based Control for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.02600v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in high-level reasoning and semantic understanding, applying them directly to contact-rich manipulation remains a challenge due to their lack of explicit physical grounding and inability to perform adaptive control. reported_papers.title: ShapeGrasp: Simultaneous Visuo-Haptic Shape Completion and Grasping for Improved Robot Manipulation

reported_papers.title: VILAS: A VLA-Integrated Low-cost Architecture with Soft Grasping for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.02037v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present VILAS, a fully low-cost, modular robotic manipulation platform designed to support end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) policy learning and deployment on accessible hardware. reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01948v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Collecting diverse, high-quality manipulation data for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model training remains prohibitively expensive for many research groups, as existing teleoperation frameworks rely on specialized hardware or are tightly coupled to specific robot platforms. reported_papers.title: Anticipation-VLA: Solving Long-Horizon Embodied Tasks via Anticipation-based Subgoal Generation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01772v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for embodied intelligence, enabling robots to perform tasks based on natural language instructions and current visual input. reported_papers.title: Hydra-DP3: Frequency-Aware Right-Sizing of 3D Diffusion Policies for Visuomotor Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01581v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion-based visuomotor policies perform well in robotic manipulation, yet current methods still inherit image-generation-style decoders and multi-step sampling. reported_papers.title: An Efficient Metric for Data Quality Measurement in Imitation Learning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Imitation learning (IL) has seen remarkable progress, yet field deployment of IL-powered robots remains hindered by the challenge of out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. reported_papers.reason: 提出一种用于衡量模仿学习数据质量的度量指标，辅助OOD场景下的微调。属于数据-centric AI范畴，对VLA训练数据筛选有间接帮助，非核心模型改进。

reported_papers.title: VOFA: Visual Object Goal Pushing with Force-Adaptive Control for Humanoids
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01518v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The ability to push large objects in a goal-directed manner using onboard egocentric perception is an essential skill for humanoid robots to perform complex tasks such as material handling in warehouses. reported_papers.title: Decompose and Recompose: Reasoning New Skills from Existing Abilities for Cross-Task Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01448v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Cross-task generalization is a core challenge in open-world robotic manipulation, and the key lies in extracting transferable manipulation knowledge from seen tasks. reported_papers.title: A Principled Approach for Creating High-fidelity Synthetic Demonstrations for Imitation Learning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01232v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled visually realistic demonstration generation from a single expert trajectory and a short multi-view scan. reported_papers.title: To Do or Not to Do: Ensuring the Safety of Visuomotor Policies Learned from Demonstrations
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01201v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Task success has historically been the primary measure of policy performance in imitation learning (IL) research. reported_papers.title: VLA-ATTC: Adaptive Test-Time Compute for VLA Models with Relative Action Critic Model

reported_papers.title: Sentinel-VLA: A Metacognitive VLA Model with Active Status Monitoring for Dynamic Reasoning and Error Recovery
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.01191v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced the field of embodied manipulation by harnessing broad world knowledge and strong generalization. reported_papers.title: Online Safety Filter for Deformable Object Manipulation with Horizon Agnostic Neural Operators

reported_papers.title: Cascaded Flow Matching for Heterogeneous Tabular Data with Mixed-Type Features

reported_papers.title: Binomial flows: Denoising and flow matching for discrete ordinal data
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00360v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Flow-based generative modeling in continuous spaces exploit Tweedie's formula to express the denoiser (learned in training) as a score function (used in sampling). reported_papers.title: Free Energy Surface Sampling via Reduced Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00337v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sampling the free energy surface, namely, the distribution of collective variables (CVs), is a crucial problem in statistical physics, as it underpins a better understanding of chemical reactions and conformational transitions. reported_papers.title: Posterior Augmented Flow Matching

reported_papers.title: Flow matching for Sentinel-2 super-resolution: implementation, application, and implications

reported_papers.title: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling

reported_papers.title: Borrowed Geometry: Computational Reuse of Frozen Text-Pretrained Transformer Weights Across Modalities

reported_papers.title: Mean-Field Path-Integral Diffusion: From Samples to Interacting Agents

reported_papers.title: VLBiMan: Vision-Language Anchored One-Shot Demonstration Enables Generalizable Bimanual Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2509.21723v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Achieving generalizable bimanual manipulation requires systems that can learn efficiently from minimal human input while adapting to real-world uncertainties and diverse embodiments. reported_papers.title: VLAs are Confined yet Capable of Generalizing to Novel Instructions
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2505.03500v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision-language-action models (VLAs) often achieve high performance on demonstrated tasks but struggle significantly when required to extrapolate, combining skills learned from different tasks in novel ways. reported_papers.title: Thinking in Text and Images: Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning Traces for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00438v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires plans that are both logically coherent and geometrically grounded. reported_papers.title: MSACT: Multistage Spatial Alignment for Stable Low-Latency Fine Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00475v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Real-world fine manipulation, particularly in bimanual manipulation, typically requires low-latency control and stable visual localization, while collecting large-scale data is costly and limited demonstrations may lead to localization drift. reported_papers.title: Stereo Multistage Spatial Attention for Real-Time Mobile Manipulation Under Visual Scale Variation and Disturbances
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00471v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robots operating in open, unstructured real-world environments must rely on onboard visual perception while autonomously moving across different locations. reported_papers.reason: 提出立体多级空间注意力机制以应对移动操作中的尺度变化与干扰。侧重传统视觉感知模块优化，未深度融合VLA架构，且缺乏大规模基准对比，属相邻领域改进。

reported_papers.title: Learning while Deploying: Fleet-Scale Reinforcement Learning for Generalist Robot Policies
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.00416v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generalist robot policies increasingly benefit from large-scale pretraining, but offline data alone is insufficient for robust real-world deployment. reported_papers.title: MiniVLA-Nav v1: A Multi-Scene Simulation Dataset for Language-Conditioned Robot Navigation

reported_papers.title: VLA-InfoEntropy: A Training-Free Vision-Attention Information Entropy Approach for Vision-Language-Action Models Inference Acceleration and Success
reported_papers.reason: 利用视觉注意力熵加速 VLA 推理且无需训练，思路巧妙但性能提升幅度未知，需进一步实验确认有效性。

reported_papers.title: HiPolicy: Hierarchical Multi-Frequency Action Chunking for Policy Learning
reported_papers.reason: 提出分层多频动作分块策略平衡长程依赖与精细控制，方法合理但实验仅在简单仿真任务，缺乏实机验证。

reported_papers.title: BiCoord: A Bimanual Manipulation Benchmark towards Long-Horizon Spatial-Temporal Coordination
reported_papers.reason: 发布面向长程时空协调的双臂操作基准 BiCoord，填补现有基准在复杂协作任务上的空白，立即可用。

reported_papers.title: GraspSense: Physically Grounded Grasp and Grip Planning for a Dexterous Robotic Hand via Language-Guided Perception and Force Maps
reported_papers.reason: 结合语言引导与力地图进行灵巧手抓取规划，侧重物理接触策略，未展示端到端 VLA 训练流程。

reported_papers.title: Rectified Schr\"odinger Bridge Matching for Few-Step Visual Navigation
A1: A Fully Transparent Open-Source, Adaptive and Efficient Truncated Vision-Language-Action Model
reported_papers.reason: 提出截断式高效 VLA 架构 A1，显著降低推理成本并开源代码，适合资源受限场景的快速部署尝试。

reported_papers.title: Grounding Hierarchical Vision-Language-Action Models Through Explicit Language-Action Alignment
reported_papers.reason: 通过显式语言 - 动作对齐提升层级 VLA 透明度，理论贡献为主，缺乏大规模实验验证其泛化能力提升。

reported_papers.title: Uncovering Linguistic Fragility in Vision-Language-Action Models via Diversity-Aware Red Teaming
reported_papers.reason: 利用多样性感知红队测试揭示 VLA 语言脆弱性，提供具体的攻击生成工具包，可用于模型安全性评估。

reported_papers.title: Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy Learning for Closed-Loop Manipulation
reported_papers.reason: 引入指代感知机制增强视动策略在分布外错误下的鲁棒性，提供动态重路由轨迹的具体实现方案。

reported_papers.title: CoEnv: Driving Embodied Multi-Agent Collaboration via Compositional Environment
reported_papers.reason: 通过组合环境驱动多智能体协作，主要解决空间协调问题，缺乏针对 VLA 模型的具体训练或推理创新。

reported_papers.title: ExpressMM: Expressive Mobile Manipulation Behaviors in Human-Robot Interactions
reported_papers.reason: 研究移动操作机器人的表达性行为以沟通意图，侧重人机交互体验，对 VLA 核心控制架构改进有限。

reported_papers.title: RoboPlayground: Democratizing Robotic Evaluation through Structured Physical Domains
reported_papers.reason: 提出结构化物理域评估框架，允许用户自定义任务约束与成功标准，可直接用于扩展现有 VLA 基准测试。

reported_papers.title: GaussFly: Contrastive Reinforcement Learning for Visuomotor Policies in 3D Gaussian Fields
reported_papers.reason: 在 3D 高斯场中利用对比强化学习训练无人机视动策略，仅限仿真且针对特定飞行器，通用操作迁移性不明。

reported_papers.title: StarVLA: A Lego-like Codebase for Vision-Language-Action Model Developing
reported_papers.reason: 提供模块化 VLA 开发代码库，支持快速集成感知与动作模块，本周内可复用其架构搭建实验原型。

reported_papers.title: From Video to Control: A Survey of Learning Manipulation Interfaces from Temporal Visual Data
reported_papers.reason: 综述视频数据转化为机器人控制接口的进展，适合了解领域背景，但无新算法或即时可复用的工程贡献。

reported_papers.title: Belief Dynamics for Detecting Behavioral Shifts in Safe Collaborative Manipulation
reported_papers.reason: 提出基于信念动态的行为偏移检测以保障协作安全，方法偏向传统控制理论，未展示与 VLA 架构的直接融合路径。

reported_papers.reason: 针对语言驱动驾驶代理的指令鲁棒性研究，虽涉及 VLA 概念但局限于自动驾驶仿真，缺乏通用机器人操作验证。
